description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CMake (Windows using VCPKG) that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main, ignoring certain paths. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to build on different Windows environments (2019 and 2022) with various configurations (x64, arm64, etc.) and build types (Debug, Release). Install Ninja, set up the VCPKG environment, and configure CMake with the VCPKG toolchain. Then, build the project using CMake.
